I am Web Developer.

Know more

About me

I am highly motivated individual with proven leadership skills. Team player with strong oral and written communication skills and an analytical and problem solving aptitude.

I have completed my undergraduation in Computer Science and Engineering, and I am eager to contribute to the continued success of the team. I am working on projects that are based on MERN stack, moreover I am well versed with Java and Python as programming language.

View Resume

Projects

E-Commerce Website

This is a full responsive web application built using MERN tech stack (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, NodeJs, Redux tool, MongoDB). E-Commerce web application with Admin Panel, Redux Toolkit, Stripe Payment, Cloud Deployment and Email Invoice.

Booking App

This is a web application built using ReactJs, Express.js, Node.js and MongoDB that emulates the look and feel of the popular online marketplace for short- and long-term homestays platform, with a responsive design and carefully crafted UI, the web app offers users a familiar and engaging experience. The web app anticipates features such as bookings details and accomodations offered to the users. Moreover, the app also require user authentication

Sorting Visualizer

Sorting Visualizer is a web app for visualizing a bunch of different sorting algorithms like Selection Sort, Bubble Sort, Insertion Sort, Merge Sort, Quick Sort, Heap Sort. The web app provides a descriptive analysis in graphical format through which its easy to analyze the sorting sequence.

Hotel Management System

It is a web-based application that handles all the hotel activities online. Interactive Graphical User Interface and the ability to manage various hotel bookings and rooms make this system very flexible and convenient. Customers can view and book room online. Admin has the power of either approving or disapproving the customer’s booking request
